summary: Whitney Wolfe Herd explains her motivation for founding Bumble in 2014: to modernize outdated dating dynamics by empowering women to make the first move. She highlights the platform's evolution into a broader networking tool and reiterates her commitment to gender equality, kindness, and zero tolerance for misogyny or harassment.

principles.statement: Empower women to make the first move to modernize relationships.
principles.rationale: Despite the progress women had made in the workplace and corridors of power, dating dynamics were still outdated, leaving women disempowered and waiting for men to initiate.
principles.source_quote: For all the advances women had been making in workplaces and corridors of power, the gender dynamics of dating and romance still seemed so outdated. I thought, what if I could flip that on its head?

principles.statement: Online platforms must be strictly rooted in kindness and respect.
principles.rationale: To actively combat misogyny and advance gender equality, platforms must enforce a zero-tolerance policy for hate speech and bad behavior.
principles.source_quote: We don’t tolerate hate speech or bad behavior of any sort; Bumble is a platform rooted in kindness and respect.

mental_models.name: Flipping the dynamic on its head
mental_models.description: Taking an entrenched, outdated social norm and completely reversing the roles to create a new, empowering paradigm.
mental_models.example: Noticing that women were socially expected to wait for men to ask them out, and building a dating app where only women are allowed to send the first message.

signature_quotes.text: For all the advances women had been making in workplaces and corridors of power, the gender dynamics of dating and romance still seemed so outdated.
signature_quotes.context: Explaining the initial observation that led to the creation of Bumble.

signature_quotes.text: I thought, what if I could flip that on its head? What if women made the first move, and sent the first message?
signature_quotes.context: Describing the core concept behind Bumble's unique user experience.

signature_quotes.text: We don’t tolerate hate speech or bad behavior of any sort; Bumble is a platform rooted in kindness and respect.
signature_quotes.context: Stating the company's stance on user safety and community guidelines.

anti_patterns.description: Accepting outdated gender dynamics in romance while pushing for equality in the workplace.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It leaves women disempowered in their personal lives, forcing smart, wonderful women to wait around for men to initiate connections.

anti_patterns.description: Tolerating hate speech or bad behavior on social platforms.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It allows misogyny and sexual harassment to continue plaguing society, undermining efforts to advance gender equality.
